mapper.select: SELECT id , name , category , rating , memo , eat_date AS eatDate , created_at AS createdAt FROM food ORDER BY id
SELECT id , name , category , rating , memo , eat_date AS eatDate , created_at AS createdAt FROM food WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO food ( id, name, category, rating, memo, eat_date, created_at ) VALUES ( food_seq.NEXTVAL, #{name}, #{category}, #{rating}, #{memo}, #{eatDate}, SYSDATE )
